'''rapufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xiphosuran|xiphosuran]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-p-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xiphosuran|xiphosuran]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| rapufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræpifith|ræpifith]] || [[word:ræpifij|ræpifij]] || [[word:ræpifish|ræpifish]] || [[word:ræpifi|ræpifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rapupufuth|rapupufuth]] || [[word:rapupufuj|rapupufuj]] || [[word:rapupufush|rapupufush]] || [[word:rapupufu|rapupufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rapufuth|rapufuth]] || [[word:rapufuj|rapufuj]] || [[word:rapufush|rapufush]] || [[word:rapufu|rapufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rapuffuth|rapuffuth]] || [[word:rapuffuj|rapuffuj]] || [[word:rapuffush|rapuffush]] || [[word:rapuffuf|rapuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rapufuthu|rapufuthu]] || [[word:rapufuju|rapufuju]] || [[word:rapufushu|rapufushu]] || [[word:rapufuku|rapufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rapufuth|rapufuth]] || [[word:rapufuj|rapufuj]] || [[word:rapufush|rapufush]] || [[word:rapufu|rapufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rapufuthul|rapufuthul]] || [[word:rapufujul|rapufujul]] || [[word:rapufushul|rapufushul]] || [[word:rapufukul|rapufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rapufuthuthu|rapufuthuthu]] || [[word:rapufujuju|rapufujuju]] || [[word:rapufushushu|rapufushushu]] || [[word:rapufuku|rapufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rapufuthun|rapufuthun]] || [[word:rapufujun|rapufujun]] || [[word:rapufushun|rapufushun]] || [[word:rapufukun|rapufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rapufuthuoro|rapufuthuoro]] || [[word:rapufujuoro|rapufujuoro]] || [[word:rapufushuoro|rapufushuoro]] || [[word:rapufukuoro|rapufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
